message:
Merge PR #2694: fix: verify types.custom persisted before writing sentinel

After bd config set, verifies the value actually persisted in the database
before writing the sentinel file. Prevents caching a lie when the db write
silently fails (redirect mismatch, stale metadata, server not running).

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2694
Author: Henry-E
